category_sources: source_facts.description says tool for optimizing PNG images; official pngnq page describes quantizing PNG images in RGBA format.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pngnq; official homepage title and body identify pngnq/Pngnq.
docs_sources: Official pngnq homepage documents purpose, examples, options history, downloads, and source links.
repo_sources: Official pngnq homepage links to its SourceForge SVN source repository as current source code.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage identify PNG quantization/optimization and command-line examples.
